title: Stephen King responds to Trump's UFO files release with Epstein files call
description: Stephen King has weighed in on President Trump releasing UFO files, with the horror author making it clear he'd rather see the Epstein files released instead.

title: Dept. of War UFO Document Dump: Eyewitness Reports, Photographs of Dots, and Unintentional NASA Comedy
description: The White House has instructed the Department of War to begin releasing files related to UFOs and the first of these document dumps went online over the weekend. It contains 158 files, many of which are lengthy PDFs, so there’s a lot of information to digest. None of the information released so far is likely... title: Stephen King shuts down Trump UFO files talk by demanding Epstein file 'release'
description: Stephen King shared his view on the release of the first batch of UFO files from the Pentagon as he admitted being more interested in seeing the full Epstein files released
